justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all temporal expressions, including the initial "this Sunday" (which was in the past relative to the conversation start time) and subsequent requests for specific days and times.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent consistently offered alternatives and expanded the search window as requested by the user, although it did not proactively suggest a wider range of dates or alternative mediums until later in the conversation.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently processed all requests, combining information gathering and avoiding redundant questions or API calls.
justifications.customer_experience: The agent maintained a polite and professional tone throughout the conversation, clearly communicating unavailability and offering next steps, though the repeated unavailability could be frustrating for a customer.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent maintained full context and gracefully recovered from each instance of unavailability by suggesting the next logical time slot or offering alternative contact methods.
